_comment: Story Style catalog for the Campaign Builder. Edit freely — this file is read at runtime (cached by mtime), so tweaking a snippet or adding an option takes effect on the next request with no rebuild. Each field: {key, label, allow_custom, options}. Each option: {id, label, hint, prompt}. `prompt` is the directive injected into the narrator prompt when that option is selected; `hint` is a short player-facing description and never reaches the model. Fields with allow_custom=true let the player type a free-text value (rendered as 'Label: <text>'). custom_instructions is a fixed freeform field handled separately (not listed here).

options.label: High Fantasy
options.hint: Magic, kingdoms, and myth — a world where wonder is real.
options.prompt: Genre: High Fantasy. A world of magic, ancient powers, and mythic geography. Treat magic, monsters, and prophecy as real facts of the world with real consequences, not metaphors.

options.label: Classic Sci-Fi
options.prompt: Genre: Classic Science Fiction. Ground events in technology, science, and their consequences. Speculation is rigorous; the wonder comes from ideas and their implications rather than magic.

options.label: Space Opera
options.hint: Starships, empires, and larger-than-life adventure across the stars.
options.prompt: Genre: Space Opera. Sweeping adventure across star systems — starships, factions and empires, exotic worlds, and larger-than-life stakes. Favor spectacle and momentum over hard-science rigor.

options.label: Hybrid (Science Fantasy)
options.hint: Magic and technology side by side.
options.prompt: Genre: Science Fantasy. Magic and advanced technology coexist and intertwine — spellcasters and machines, arcane relics and starships. Blend the wondrous and the technological without treating either as out of place.

options.label: Modern
options.hint: The contemporary real world (or a shade of it).
options.prompt: Genre: Modern. A contemporary, recognizable real-world setting. Keep technology, culture, and logic grounded in the present day unless the scenario establishes otherwise.

options.label: Horror
options.hint: Dread, danger, and things that should not be.
options.prompt: Genre: Horror. Build dread and vulnerability. Keep threats uncertain and dangerous, let tension breathe, and make safety feel provisional — the world should never feel fully under the player's control.

options.label: Light-Hearted
options.hint: Warm and fun; stakes stay personal.
options.prompt: Tone: Light-hearted. Keep the mood warm and the stakes personal. Find humor in situations, favor hope over despair, and never dwell on gore or cruelty.

options.label: Epic
options.hint: Sweeping stakes and moments of awe.
options.prompt: Tone: Epic. Sweeping stakes, gravity, and moments of awe. Give weight to choices and let the world feel vast and consequential.

options.label: Grim / Dark
options.hint: Harsh, morally grey, consequences that hurt.
options.prompt: Tone: Grim and dark. The world is harsh and morally grey. Let consequences land hard, keep victories costly, and don't shy from difficult outcomes.

options.label: Cozy
options.prompt: Tone: Cozy. Gentle, low-stakes, and comforting. Emphasize small pleasures, safety, and connection; conflict is mild and resolves kindly.

options.label: Grounded & Political (G.R.R. Martin-like)
options.prompt: Writing style: grounded, sensory, and politically aware, in the vein of George R. R. Martin. Use concrete physical detail, morally ambiguous characters, and consequences that stick.

options.label: Mythic & Dreamlike (Neil Gaiman-like)
options.prompt: Writing style: mythic and dreamlike, in the vein of Neil Gaiman. Lean into fairy-tale cadence, quiet strangeness, and imagery that lingers just past the edge of the ordinary.

options.label: Witty & Satirical (Terry Pratchett-like)
options.prompt: Writing style: witty and satirical, in the vein of Terry Pratchett. Wry humor, clever asides, and warmth beneath the comedy — never mean-spirited.

options.label: Young Adult
options.prompt: Writing style: Young Adult. Immediate and emotionally direct, with a brisk pace, vivid feeling, and accessible prose centered on the protagonist's inner experience.

options.label: Shounen
options.hint: High energy, bold action, heart and hype.
options.prompt: Writing style: shounen anime energy. Bold, high-energy action, big emotional beats, declarations of resolve, and escalating momentum — earnest and hype over subtle.

options.label: Terse
options.prompt: Length: keep each beat to one or two tight paragraphs. Favor economy — advance the scene without lingering.

options.label: Standard
options.hint: A balanced few paragraphs per beat.
options.prompt: Length: two to four paragraphs per beat — enough to set the scene and advance it without overstaying.

options.label: Lush
options.prompt: Length: write richly and immersively, several full paragraphs per beat, with generous sensory description — while still leaving a clear opening for the player's next action.

options.label: Teen
options.prompt: Content limit: keep content suitable for teens. Violence is non-graphic, romance fades to black, and there is no explicit sexual content or extreme gore.

options.label: Adult
options.prompt: Content limit: mature. Adult themes, meaningful peril, and frank subject matter are allowed, handled with narrative purpose rather than gratuitousness.

options.label: R-Rated
options.prompt: Content limit: R-rated. Graphic violence and explicit content are permitted when the scene calls for it. Follow the player's lead on intensity and keep it in service of the story.

options.label: Second person ("You…")
options.prompt: Perspective: narrate in the second person, addressing the player character directly as "you".

options.label: Third person
options.hint: Narrate the player character by name.
options.prompt: Perspective: narrate in the third person, referring to the player character by name and as "they".

options.label: Linear
options.prompt: Structure: a focused, linear main storyline. Keep events pulling toward the central plot and its next objective.

options.label: Episodic
options.prompt: Structure: episodic. Tell largely self-contained adventures that resolve in turn, connected by recurring characters and an evolving world rather than one long throughline.

options.label: Sandbox
options.prompt: Structure: open sandbox. Let the player drive direction; keep the world reactive and full of options rather than steering toward a fixed plot.
